name: B Side

notes: The current restaurant-issued dinner, brunch, kids, and happy-hour menus publish 66 food and nonalcoholic presentations that consolidate to 58 canonical products; alcohol-only rows are excluded and nonalcoholic beverages remain last.
All 25 frozen rows reconcile as exact products, but the dinner-only frozen catalog omits 33 current products and loses repeated cross-service presentation evidence.
Post-repair recheck pins 58 canonical products from 66 current restaurant-issued dinner, brunch, kids, and happy-hour presentations, with alcohol-only rows excluded and nonalcoholic beverages last.
All 25 frozen products reconcile exactly once; all 33 omitted current products and the repeated cross-service presentation evidence are restored.

Thirty products retain narrow direct positives from restaurant-issued menu text, two use restaurant-linked ingredient descriptions, two use restaurant-linked affirmative product sections, and twenty-four remain unavailable.

Only Sour Cream & Onion Chicharrones carries may-contain evidence: the linked product states that it contains dairy and is cross-contaminated with gluten and dairy. No complete matrix, negative assurance, or restaurant-wide cross-contact policy was found.
The corrected catalog contains exactly 30 official ingredient rows, two restaurant-linked menu-ingredient rows, two restaurant-linked product rows, and 24 unavailable rows.

Sour Cream & Onion Chicharrones is the sole may-contain row; its linked dairy, gluten, and dairy cross-contact wording remains item-specific vendor evidence and is not generalized into a matrix or restaurant-wide warning.
The frozen extraction reflects only part of the dinner menu, carries stale PDF-column category assignments, and omits the current brunch, kids, happy-hour, and nonalcoholic beverage boundaries.

All 25 frozen rows reconcile exactly once: fifteen have stale allergen or source outcomes and ten are accurately unavailable. Linked-vendor positives and cross-contact text must remain linked provenance.
The hash-pinned catalog preserves all owner-menu service presentations, corrects the stale PDF-column categories, consolidates repeated products deterministically, and keeps beverages last.
The 25 frozen rows finish with fifteen corrected mismatch outcomes and ten accurately unavailable outcomes; no linked evidence is promoted to restaurant-issued authority.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current restaurant-issued identity page and its links to the Fairfax menus and ordering surface.
Captured and hash-pinned the current restaurant-issued dinner menu.
Captured and hash-pinned the current restaurant-issued brunch menu.
Captured and hash-pinned the current restaurant-issued kids menu.
Captured and hash-pinned the current restaurant-issued happy-hour menu.
Reviewed the current restaurant-linked ordering page for partial ingredient, affirmative allergen, and item-specific cross-contact evidence.
notes: Missing linked-menu labels are not negative evidence.

findings.summary: The 25-row frozen catalog is dinner-only and omits 33 products from the current 58-product, 66-presentation boundary across dinner, brunch, kids, happy hour, and nonalcoholic beverages.
findings.resolution: Restored all 33 omitted products and pinned all 66 current source presentations to 58 canonical products.

findings.summary: The frozen PDF extraction retains stale dinner-column category outcomes and does not preserve repeated products across their current service presentations.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt source-scoped categories and retained every repeated service presentation on its canonical product.

findings.summary: Fifteen frozen rows have direct allergen or source outcomes inconsistent with the current owner menus and partial restaurant-linked evidence; ten frozen rows are accurately unavailable.
findings.resolution: Corrected all fifteen mismatch outcomes, preserved the ten accurately unavailable rows, and retained exact restaurant-issued versus linked-vendor provenance.

findings.summary: The frozen Sour Cream & Onion Chicharrones row omits the linked product's affirmative dairy statement and item-specific gluten-and-dairy cross-contact disclosure.
findings.resolution: Restored the linked dairy positive and the item-specific milk and gluten may-contain signals without generalizing them to any other product.

repairs.summary: Verified the 58-product and 66-presentation boundary, exact authority split, frozen reconciliation, corrected categories, and sole item-specific Chicharrones cross-contact row.

notes: Terra low research was escalated to Sol medium; coordinator review expanded the boundary from dinner-only to every current restaurant-issued service menu and preserved linked-vendor authority.
The targeted B Side catalog/reconciliation suite and generated-data regression passed.
Generated counts: 58 total products from 66 presentations; 30 official ingredients; 2 linked-menu ingredients; 2 linked-product disclosures; 24 unavailable; 1 may-contain row.
